opinion.h4: OWENS v. ELLIS, CORRECTIONS DIRECTOR, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF CRIMINAL APPEALS OF TEXAS. No. 506, Misc. Decided November 6, 1961.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: TWENTIETH CENTURY-FOX FILM CORP. v. GEROSA, 368 U.S. 33 (1961)
opinion.p: 368 U.S. 33 TWENTIETH CENTURY-FOX FILM CORP. v. GEROSA, COMPTROLLER OF NEW YORK CITY. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 373. Decided November 6, 1961.
Leo A. Larkin, Stanley Buchsbaum and Morris L. Heath for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
